title: M&T Bank Offers Rate And Operating Leverage, But Execution Is Crucial
text: M&T Bank had a better-than-average quarter, as slightly weaker spread income growth was offset by better fee-based income and significantly better operating leverage. While the bank has ample cash to fund lending, deposit/funding costs are accelerating. Meanwhile, C&I lending is growing nicely while management is pulling back on CRE loans.

title: M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: M&T Bank Corporation (NYSE:MTB ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call January 19, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Brian Klock - Head of Markets & Investor Relations Darren King - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Matthew O'Connor - Deutsche Bank John Pancari - Evercore ISI Ebrahim Poonawala - BofA Securities Manan Gosalia - Morgan Stanley Ken Usdin - Jefferies Steven Alexopoulos - JPMorgan Gerard Cassidy - RBC Capital Markets Operator Welcome to the M&T Bank Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2022 Earnings Conference Call. [Operator Instructions].

title: M&T Bank (MTB) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates on Higher Revenues
text: Increase in revenues, solid loan and deposit balance and higher rates support M&T Bank's (MTB) Q4 earnings, while higher provisions and expenses pose as undermining factors.

title: M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.24% and 5.99%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: M&T BANK CORPORATION ANNOUNCES FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL-YEAR RESULTS
text: BUFFALO, N.Y. , Jan. 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank Corporation ("M&T") (NYSE: MTB) today reported its results of operations for the full year and quarter ended December 31, 2022.

title: M&T Bank: Shares Fall To Support Ahead Of Earnings, 2023 EPS Growth Expected
text: Regional banks were a popular area for value investors last year, but recession risks continue to weigh on the space. M&T Bank boasts high expected earnings growth in 2023 and its stock price has bounced initially off long-term support.
